backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining the GPS packet tracker backend with types for Model, Flavour, and ReportEntry, and methods to upsert, query, and count reports along with display column management.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that upgrades stored actor state by adding the `#aqi` variant to the Flavour type, mapping all existing report entries from the old schema to the new one.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing two bugs to fix: AQI flavour not persisting correctly during CSV/XLS import, and a unit count mismatch where 4 uploaded files only show 3 units in the reports table.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Truncated JSON document summarizing each frontend source file's purpose and recent changes, serving as a reference for build planning and component documentation.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base CSS file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes covering background, foreground, chart, and sidebar color tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the GPS Packet Tracker app, loading SheetJS from CDN for XLS/XLSX support and mounting the React app via `/src/main.tsx`.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React app component that sets up TanStack Router with three routes (Dashboard, DataEntry, Report) wrapped in a shared Layout, plus a Sonner toast provider.
frontend/src/components/ColumnMappingSel: A React component that renders a grouped, categorized checkbox list allowing users to select which additional (non-built-in) columns to display in the dashboard and reports, with select-all and clear-all controls.
frontend/src/components/CSVImportSection: CSV/XLS file import UI component that lets users select model, flavour, and location before uploading files, then parses and batch-upserts records to the backend via `useDirectUpsert`.
frontend/src/components/DataEntryForm.ts: A form component for manually entering GPS unit packet data (per unit rows) with model/flavour/location selectors, row validation, and submission via the upsertReport mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: A top-level layout shell that renders a sticky header with navigation links, a main content area, and a footer wrapping all page content.
frontend/src/components/ModelSummaryCard: A card component that displays aggregated GPS unit statistics (unit count, packet totals, GPS fix %, stored %) for a single model, with breakdowns by flavour and location.
frontend/src/components/ReportFilters.ts: A filter bar component for the reports page that provides week, model, and unit ID filters, plus a CSV export button that downloads the currently filtered report entries.
frontend/src/components/WeeklyReportTabl: A sortable table component that displays weekly GPS tracker report entries with columns for unit ID, model, flavour, location, and packet counts, including footer totals and percentage calculations.
frontend/src/components/WeekNavigator.ts: A navigation component with previous/next buttons for stepping through ISO week labels, constrained to available weeks when provided.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useColumnMapping.ts: A React hook that manages a persisted list of selected custom columns in localStorage, providing toggle, select-all, clear, and value-retrieval utilities.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks and mutations for fetching and upserting GPS tracker report entries from the ICP backend, along with ISO week label utilities and model/flavour type re-exports.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up a dark navy theme with amber accents using Tailwind CSS custom properties (oklch colors), custom scrollbar styles, and reusable component utility classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: A dashboard page that displays GPS tracker KPIs and per-model summary cards for a selected week, with model filtering and week navigation controls.
frontend/src/pages/DataEntryPage.tsx: React page for data entry that provides two tabs — file import (CSV/XLS via CSVImportSection) and manual entry (DataEntryForm) — with a shared WeekNavigator for selecting the target ISO week.
frontend/src/pages/ReportPage.tsx: React page that fetches all report entries, filters them by selected week, model, and unit ID, and renders them in a WeeklyReportTable with WeekNavigator and ReportFilters controls.
frontend/src/utils/csvParser.ts: Parses Waggle Portal CSV/XLS GPS tracker exports into structured ParsedRecord objects, handling per-packet event-log format detection, column mapping (Address, HWID, PktState), and invalid unit ID filtering.
frontend/src/utils/reportFilters.ts: Provides utility functions and a known-invalid unit ID set for filtering ReportEntry arrays, validating unit IDs, and counting distinct units consistently across the app.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom navy and amber color palettes (oklch), Inter/JetBrains Mono fonts, CSS-variable-based semantic color tokens, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for the GPS Packet Tracker app, recording two known bugs to fix: flavour value being overwritten with 'Premium' on AQI imports, and a unit count mismatch showing 3 instead of 4 units after batch upload.
